# External Viva Preparation Pack (Detailed English Edition)

## Included Files
- `01-project-flow.md`  
  Full architecture and end-to-end feature flow with context.
- `02-core-viva-qa.md`  
  Expanded examiner-style Q&A with strong and explainable answers.
- `03-ml-deep-dive.md`  
  Beginner-friendly but in-depth ML explanation (training, data, inference, limitations).
- `04-auth-security-explainer.md`  
  JWT and authentication explained from basics to viva defense.
- `05-booking-conflict-explainer.md`  
  Booking overlap logic, lifecycle, and scale-up strategy.
- `06-innovation-defense.md`  
  Strong uniqueness narrative when examiner challenges novelty.
- `07-rapid-revision.md`  
  Last-night revision script with mock grilling responses.
- `08-ml-transfer-learning-masterclass.md`  
  Deep transfer learning explanation with trap Q&A.
- `09-mongodb-end-to-end.md`  
  Full MongoDB architecture, CRUD, indexing, TTL, and scaling defense.
- `10-rolewise-viva-backend.md`  
  Backend role guide with architecture and role-specific viva questions.
- `11-rolewise-viva-frontend.md`  
  Frontend role guide with flow and decision explanations.
- `12-rolewise-viva-auth-security.md`  
  Auth and security role guide with JWT-depth answers.
- `13-rolewise-viva-database.md`  
  Database role guide for storage/fetch/scaling questions.
- `14-rolewise-viva-ml-ai.md`  
  ML/AI role guide with deep model and hybrid integration defense.

## Recommended Study Order
1. Start with `07-rapid-revision.md` for fast confidence.
2. Read `01-project-flow.md` to understand full system story.
3. Practice `02-core-viva-qa.md` aloud.
4. Use `03-ml-deep-dive.md` for high-risk ML questions.
5. Use `08-ml-transfer-learning-masterclass.md` for deep ML viva preparation.
6. Use `09-mongodb-end-to-end.md` for database storage/fetch/index answers.
7. Use `10-14` rolewise guides to prepare per-role examiner rounds.
8. Revise `06-innovation-defense.md` for uniqueness challenges.
9. Keep `04-auth-security-explainer.md` and `05-booking-conflict-explainer.md` for focused technical follow-ups.

## How to practice effectively
- Speak each answer in your own words, not by memorizing exact lines.
- For every module, remember: implementation, limitation, improvement.
- Practice “short answer” (30 sec) and “expanded answer” (90 sec) for the same question.
